front.title: X.509 Certificate Extended Key Usage (EKU) for Attestation Keys

abstract.t: X.509 certificates ([RFC5280]) defines the Extended Key Usage (EKU) extension and specifies several key purpose identifiers (KeyPurposeIds) for use with that extension. This document defines a KeyPurposeId for the purpose of signing Evidence to provide remote attestation functions as defined in the RATS Architecture ([RFC9334]).
